sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66478" key="meso/polis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσό-πολις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n66478.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μητρόπολις</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.301d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
